title: Lemon-Dill Tartar Sauce
description: Bright, tangy tartar sauce with red onion, fresh dill, and a splash of pickle brine. Makes about 1.5 cups.

items: ⅓ cup dill pickles, finely chopped

instructions: In a bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, chopped pickles, red onion, and fresh dill.
Add the pickle brine, lemon juice, lemon zest, black pepper, and salt. Mix well.
Cover and refrigerate at least 30 minutes so the flavors meld. Taste and adjust salt or lemon before serving.

notes.label: Storage
notes.text: Keeps 1–2 weeks in an airtight container in the fridge, limited by the freshness of the mayo. Adjust brine or lemon for more tang.
